actions.label: Git repositories
actions.description: Select or connect governed repositories through backend-safe routing.

actions.label: Create prompt
actions.prompt: Create an owner-correct implementation prompt. Audit the real owner chain first, preserve modularity, remove duplicate ownership, and define the exact verification steps.

actions.label: Code review
actions.description: Prepare a repository review command for Developer Mode.
actions.prompt: Review the selected repository for broken behavior, duplicate ownership, token drift, unsafe backend assumptions, missing tests, and production blockers. Return exact files, root causes, and verification gaps.

actions.label: Debug issue
actions.description: Prepare a debugging command for Developer Mode.
actions.prompt: Debug the selected repository issue. Reproduce the failure, identify the owner file, explain the root cause, propose the smallest safe patch, and define verification commands.

actions.label: Fix code
actions.description: Prepare a guarded implementation command for Developer Mode.
actions.prompt: Implement the requested code fix in the selected repository. Audit first, preserve modular ownership, avoid unsafe mutation until approval, return the patch plan, and verify the result.
